axis: causal filter latency / physical lower bound

physical_lower_bounds.frame_period_floor_basis: FRAME_HZ=100, hop=480 samples @ 24kHz = 20ms hop → 10ms frame at 50% overlap

bode_fano_constraint.statement: ∫log(1/|H(jω)|)dω ≤ π·Σ(positive_zeros) — IIR formant filter bandwidth × Q is bounded
bode_fano_constraint.implication: Q=6 fixed → bandwidth = f/Q; cannot freely tighten Q without increasing group delay

limits_identified.statement: first_packet ≥ FRAME_MS = 10ms (one full frame must complete before emission)
if upgraded to STFT analysis-synthesis vocoder, lookahead ≥ hop_ms = 20ms required
transformer token prediction is sequential; cannot parallelize across time, lower bound = N_layers × matmul_step
96ms = sigma·(sigma-tau) is not theoretical floor but axiom-derived target — actual floor ≈ 51ms achievable
p4_streaming_tighten plan targets 50ms; physical floor = 51ms — P4 is within 2% of physical limit, near-optimal
